shapText: Nifty 50 overweight due to rising income stability and longer horizon; PPF/FD allocation balances downside risk. Gold hedge increased due to recent volatility. ELSS added for tax benefits. Crypto limited by moderate risk profile.
llmSummary: We recommend a moderately aggressive allocation balancing growth and stability, aligned with your time horizon and risk tolerance. Includes tax-saving ELSS and Indian market exposure. Rebalance quarterly or on 10% drift.
